title: Expense Reimbursement Process and Submission Deadlines
text:
Q: What is the process for submitting expense reimbursements and what are the deadlines?
A: To submit an expense reimbursement, employees must complete the Expense Reimbursement Form available on the company intranet. All receipts must be attached and clearly labeled with the purpose of the expense. Submissions should be made within 30 days of the expense date to ensure timely processing. The completed form and receipts should be submitted to your direct supervisor for approval. Once approved, the supervisor will forward the request to the Finance Department. Reimbursements are processed bi-weekly, and employees can expect to receive their funds in their next paycheck following approval. For any questions or issues regarding the reimbursement process, please contact the Finance Department at finance@company.com.
